landing.heroSubtitle: Schedule, publish, and analyze content across 15+ social media platforms. Built for creators, teams, and developers. All from one powerful dashboard.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Powerful features to manage your entire social media presence
landing.visualCalendarDesc: Drag & drop scheduling with monthly/weekly views across all platforms.
landing.multiPlatformDesc: Publish to 15+ social platforms simultaneously with per-platform customization.
landing.advancedAnalyticsDesc: Track engagement, growth, and top-performing posts with beautiful charts.
landing.aiGeneratorDesc: Generate captions, hashtags, threads, and replies powered by GPT-4o.
landing.unifiedInboxDesc: Manage comments, messages, and reviews from all platforms in one place.
landing.smartQueueDesc: AI-powered scheduling that finds the best times to post for maximum engagement.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs
landing.footerTagline: All-in-one social media management platform. Schedule, publish, and analyze across 15+ platforms.
landing.mobileAppDesc: Install Komet on your phone for a native-like experience
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Connect your accounts, create content, and publish everywhere — all from one dashboard.
landing.step1Desc: Link your social media profiles with one-click OAuth. We support 15+ platforms including Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and X.
landing.step2Desc: Drag & drop posts onto the calendar. Use our AI to generate captions, hashtags, and find the best times to publish.
landing.step3Desc: Monitor engagement, follower growth, and ROI across all platforms. Export reports and refine your strategy.
landing.analyticsDesc: Track engagement, follower growth, and top-performing content across all your platforms. Beautiful charts, exportable reports, and real-time data.
landing.audienceSubtitle: Whether you're a solo creator, a growing team, or an agency managing dozens of accounts.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to streamline your social media?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of creators and teams who trust Komet to manage their content across every platform.
landing.ctaFooter: No credit card required. Free forever plan available.

hero.title: Komet on Mobile
hero.subtitle: Take your social media management on the go. Schedule posts, track analytics, and manage your inbox — all from your phone. Install as a Progressive Web App for a native-like experience.
checkmarks: Works on iOS, Android, and any modern browser
Full dashboard with calendar and analytics
Push notifications for publishing and engagement
Automatic sync between desktop and mobile

features.heading: Mobile Features
features.title: Everything you love, now on mobile
features.subtitle: Full-featured mobile experience with zero compromises.

items.title: Blazing Fast
items.desc: Native app-like performance. Navigate between calendar, posts, and analytics instantly.

items.title: Push Notifications
items.desc: Get notified when posts publish, comments arrive, or tokens are about to expire.

items.title: Offline Access
items.desc: Browse your content calendar and draft posts even without internet connection.

items.title: Quick Share
items.desc: Share content directly from your phone browser or gallery to Komet in one tap.

items.title: Seamless Sync
items.desc: All your data syncs instantly between desktop and mobile. Pick up where you left off.

items.title: Home Screen Ready
items.desc: Add to your home screen and use it like any other app. No app store needed.

install.heading: Installation Guide
install.title: Install in 3 simple steps
install.subtitle: No app store, no downloads. Just a simple add to your home screen.

steps.title: Open in Browser
steps.desc: Visit app.komet.com on your phone using Chrome, Safari, or Edge.

steps.title: Add to Home Screen
steps.desc: Tap the share button (iOS) or the install prompt (Android) and select Add to Home Screen.

steps.title: Start Scheduling
steps.desc: Launch Komet from your home screen and manage your content like a native app.

install.browserIosDesc: Tap Share → Add to Home Screen
install.browserAndroidDesc: Tap Install prompt or menu → Install App
install.browserDesktopDesc: Click Install icon in address bar

comparison.title: PWA vs Native App
comparison.subtitle: Why we chose PWA over a native mobile app.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Text: By accessing or using Komet ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you may not use the Service.
terms.section2Text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account. Komet cannot and will not be liable for any loss or damage from your failure to comply with this security obligation.
terms.section3Text: You agree not to misuse the Service. This includes, but is not limited to: violating any laws, infringing intellectual property rights, sending spam, distributing malware, or attempting to gain unauthorized access to our systems.
terms.section4Text: We strive to maintain 99.9% uptime but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the Service with reasonable notice.
terms.section5Text: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Komet shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of your use of the Service.
terms.section6Text: Questions about these Terms? Contact us at

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.whatAreText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences, keep you signed in, and understand how you use Komet.
cookies.howWeUseText: We use essential cookies for authentication and security. We use analytics cookies to understand usage patterns and improve the Service. We do not use third-party advertising cookies.
cookies.essentialDesc: Required for the Service to function (authentication, security).
cookies.preferenceDesc: Remember your settings like language and theme.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us measure and improve performance.
cookies.managingText: Most browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can usually delete existing cookies, block third-party cookies, or block all cookies. Note that blocking essential cookies may prevent Komet from functioning properly.
cookies.contactText: Questions about our Cookie Policy? Contact us at

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.v14Item1: New auto-scrolling marquee on landing page for platform integrations
changelog.v14Item2: Responsive padding improvements across all cards on mobile
changelog.v14Item3: Footer redesigned with multi-column SaaS layout
changelog.v13Item1: Fixed GPU compositing artifacts on platform card section for Android Chrome
changelog.v13Item2: Added will-change-transform and transform-gpu hints for smoother animations
changelog.v12Item1: Resolved cracked-glass rendering artifact caused by ultra-low opacity backgrounds
changelog.v12Item2: Updated card backgrounds to use solid surface-dark-elevated colors
changelog.v11Item2: Scheduling, analytics, AI content generator, and unified inbox

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Komet ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our social media scheduling platform at kontenmumelesat.com (the "Service"). By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.
privacy.section1Text: We collect information you provide directly: account registration details (name, email), social media account connections via OAuth, content you create (posts, drafts, media), and workspace preferences. We also automatically collect certain technical information: IP address, browser type, device information, usage patterns, and cookies as described in our Cookie Policy.
privacy.section2Text: We use your information to: provide and maintain the Service, authenticate your identity, post content to your connected social media accounts on your behalf, send service-related communications (account updates, security alerts), improve and personalize your experience, and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.section3Text: We share data only as necessary: with social media platforms (when you publish content), with service providers (hosting on Vercel, database on Supabase, email via Resend, AI features), and when required by law. We do NOT sell your personal data to third parties. All third-party services are bound by their own privacy and security policies.
privacy.section4Text: We retain your data as long as your account is active. You may delete your account and associated data at any time via Settings. We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption at rest and in transit, but no method of electronic storage is 100% secure.
privacy.section5Text: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to: access your personal data, correct inaccurate data, delete your data, restrict or object to processing, and data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at the email below.
privacy.section6Text: Questions about this Privacy Policy? Contact us at

pwaBanner.heading: Install Komet App
pwaBanner.description: Install as an app for the best experience. Faster access, offline support, and push notifications.

apiDocs.title: API Reference
apiDocs.description: Build on top of Komet with our REST API.
apiDocs.authText: All API requests require an API key passed via the Authorization: Bearer *** header. Generate keys in your dashboard Settings.
apiDocs.epCreatePost: Create and schedule a new post
apiDocs.epListPosts: List posts with filters (status, platform, date)
apiDocs.epGetPost: Get post details and engagement data
apiDocs.epDeletePost: Delete a scheduled or draft post
